summary: Backend-only verification for v1.14 P0/P1 Live Execution Hardening. All 167 pytest cases pass (148 pre-existing + 19 new in test_execution_hardening_v14.py). Tick-size snap helper, 7 new timeline events, broker_audit_log SQLite table, /api/bot/broker_audit endpoint, and live_quotes age fields all verified. No regressions in SMC/HTF/sizer/execution_correctness/fsm/telegram_notifier/order_pending/preflight suites.
critical_code_review_comments: live_quotes.option_ltp_age_ms and spot_age_ms return null when no ticks received yet — acceptable but consumer UI must handle null gracefully.
broker_audit ring bounded to 100 in-memory; long-running sessions rely on SQLite persistence via record_broker_audit — verified table+indexes exist.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v1.14 hardening additive-only. Verified: (1) 167/167 pytest green; (2) _tick_round(101.234)=101.25 & _tick_round(101.267)=101.25; (3) 7 new Event constants exist (TP_REJECTED, SL_REJECTED, TRAIL_REJECTED, PROTECTION_HEALTH_OK/FAIL, BROKER_DELAY, PENDING_TIMEOUT); (4) GET /api/bot/broker_audit returns {"entries":[],"count":0}; (5) broker_audit_log table schema present in nifty_bot.db; (6) /api/bot/status now exposes live_quotes.option_ltp_age_ms & spot_age_ms fields (null when no ticks). Iterations 3-6 test suites remain intact.
rca of the issue: N/A — hardening validation only, no bugs found.
